response: I sent an email in English yesterday inviting them to choose between two available times for a training session. Could you help me write an English email based on this context? Thank you for your response yesterday. We will hold the Compliance System Training today at 6:14 PM and 4:00 PM to 5:00 PM in the tearms. The training will be conducted in English, and we hope you can attend on time. Thank you.
